title: FancyFormatDock
body:
# **Join my discord server! https://discord.gg/Xtkt9f6R2f**

![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/fancyformatdock?logo=modrinth&logoColor=%2300AF5C&labelColor=white&color=%2300AF5C) ![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-Fabric-ffe066?labelColor=white&logo=fabric&logoColor=ffe066) ![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client-8a2be2?labelColor=white) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-red?labelColor=white) ![Release](https://img.shields.io/badge/release-v1.4.1-blue?labelColor=white)

## **FancyFormatDock**

**📋• Info**

While playing on servers like [Modernbeta](https://modernbeta.org/), I kept running into the same problem, constantly needing to look up chat formatting codes. That frustration sparked the idea for this mod. FancyFormatDock adds a simple dock to your chat screen. Just open chat, click a color button, and the formatting code is instantly inserted for you.

**🔧• Features**


<details>
<summary>dock-like button panel</summary>

When opening chat, an overlay at the top right appears. Clicking on a button will import the formatting code in chat. Format label can be toggled off in the config.

![Buttonpanel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b843c73aaf76448f1363ac679a57f1628bd25399.png) 

</details>


<details>
<summary>4 preset color buttons</summary>

Choose 4 custom colors and add them as a button to the button panel. Each button can be enabled/disabled.

![custom color prest panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15457f77725ac24c5690492a8ca4fd50ea563795.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>custom color</summary>

By clicking on the **+** button, a menu pops up. Here you can pick a custom color and import it in chat!

![Colorpicker1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/859399ca7ca3a483844ed89a04b29e9aeb7a49db.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>custom gradient color</summary>

By clicking on the **+** button, a menu pops up, from there you can go to the **gradient** tab. You can pick 2 custom colors here, insert your message and hit _Import_! This will automaticly make your text have a gradient with the 2 colors you selected

![colourpicker2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3a995905463fc3b1b12744d111175c5ca401724.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>quick show/hide button</summary>

By clicking this button, the button-like dock shows/hides.

![Show/hide button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ab326ccc2a2ca490a5a075db343168b9f6bde74.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Text prefix before a color prefix warning</summary>

__1.21.1 version only__
When using text formatting (bold, italc...) before a color prefix, the color overrides the text formatting. Enable the warning in the config to get a warning!

![Warning ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3cc8013e50c48af8026c1b66f219db18b472f8a.png)

</details>

<details>

<summary>config</summary>

By using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), you can acces the config, here you can:
  - enable/disable the button overlay
  - change format code, currently supports:
    - **Vanilla** formatting (_§c_)
    - **EssentialsX** formatting (_&c_) - **[default]**
    - **MiniMessage** formatting (_<red>_)
  - change color picker quality, current options:
    - **Low**
    - **Medium** - **[default]**
    - **High**
  - toggle format labels on buttons (on by default) __1.21.1 version only__
  - toggle waring (off by default) __1.21.1 version only__
  - choose 4 preset custom colors
  - toggle preset button on/off

![General config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86a49bd4759cfd2f96fd0ba78b13250447ab3481_0.webp)
![preset color config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75071faee52b0be97eb803007a2892ce91d7d23.png)

</details>


**🧩• Dependencies**

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (only needed if you want to acces the config)

**🚀• Version support**

<details>
<summary>✅ Currently supported</summary>
  
**fabric 1.21.1**

**fabric 1.21.2**

**fabric 1.21.3**

**fabric 1.21.4**

**fabric 1.21.5**

**fabric 1.21.6**

**fabric 1.21.7**

**fabric 1.21.8**

**fabric 1.21.9**

**fabric 1.21.10**

**fabric 1.21.11**
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>❎ Currently not supported</summary>

**fabric 26.1**

**fabric 26.2**

</details>


**🐛• Updates & Report bugs**

Want to know exactly when the mod updates or when bugs get patched? Join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/Xtkt9f6R2f)!


**📜• Credits**
